ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the TV show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Date when the TV show first premiered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the TV show */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Average runtime of each episode in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the TV show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show the episode belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode aired */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number in the season */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "writers" TEXT /* Writers of the episode */,
  "guest_stars" TEXT /* Guest stars in the episode */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Brief summary of the episode's plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES tv_shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_share" REAL /* Rating share (18-49) for the episode */,
  "viewers" REAL /* Number of viewers for the episode */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the ratings data */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the ratings data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dvr" (
  "dvr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DVR entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the DVR entry belongs to */,
  "dvr_rating_share" REAL /* DVR rating share (18-49) for the episode */,
  "dvr_viewers" REAL /* Number of DVR viewers for the episode */,
  "dvr_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for DVR viewing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dvr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dvr_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_viewers" (
  "total_viewers_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total viewership entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the total viewership entry belongs to */,
  "total_rating_share" REAL /* Total rating share (18-49) for the episode */,
  "total_viewers" REAL /* Total number of viewers for the episode */,
  "total_viewers_date" TEXT /* Date when the total viewership data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_viewers_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_viewers_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the schedule entry belongs to */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode aired */,
  "air_time" TEXT /* Time when the episode aired */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone for the schedule entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the ratings data */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the user accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the ratings data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
